back_translation: This is the book of the line of Adam. On the day that God created man, He made him in the likeness of God.
He created them male and female, blessed them, and named them "man" on the day they were created.
When Adam was 130 years old, he had a son in his own likeness, after his own image, and he named him Seth.
After Seth was born, Adam lived 800 more years and had other sons and daughters.
Adam lived a total of 930 years, and then he died.
When Seth was 105 years old, he had Enosh.
After Enosh was born, Seth lived 807 more years and had other sons and daughters.
Seth lived a total of 912 years, and then he died.
When Enosh was 90 years old, he had Kenan.
After Kenan was born, Enosh lived 815 more years and had other sons and daughters.
Enosh lived a total of 905 years, and then he died.
When Kenan was 70 years old, he had Mahalalel.
After Mahalalel was born, Kenan lived 840 more years and had other sons and daughters.
Kenan lived a total of 910 years, and then he died.
When Mahalalel was 65 years old, he had Jared.
After Jared was born, Mahalalel lived 830 more years and had other sons and daughters.
Mahalalel lived a total of 895 years, and then he died.
When Jared was 162 years old, he had Enoch.
After Enoch was born, Jared lived 800 more years and had other sons and daughters.
Jared lived a total of 962 years, and then he died.
When Enoch was 65 years old, he had Methuselah.
After Methuselah was born, Enoch walked with God for 300 more years and had other sons and daughters.
Enoch lived a total of 365 years.
Enoch walked with God, and then he was no more, because God took him away.
When Methuselah was 187 years old, he had Lamech.
After Lamech was born, Methuselah lived 782 more years and had other sons and daughters.
Methuselah lived a total of 969 years, and then he died.
When Lamech was 182 years old, he had a son.
He named the boy Noah, saying, "May this one comfort us from the work and weariness of our hands, which come from the ground that the LORD has cursed."
After Noah was born, Lamech lived 595 more years and had other sons and daughters.
Lamech lived a total of 777 years, and then he died.
When Noah was 500 years old, he had Shem, Ham, and Japheth.
